title: Existing member can log in and reach the dashboard
description: Verifies a returning user can sign in and is routed to the dashboard where personalized content loads.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify a personalized greeting is displayed

title: Completing a task increases today’s progress and updates visualizations
description: Verifies marking a daily task complete increases today’s score/XP and updates the heatmap/chart accordingly.

steps.description: Verify today’s score and XP progress increase
Verify the heatmap and activity chart reflect the completed activity

title: New user can sign up, set player name, and enter the app
description: Verifies a first-time user can register, confirm or edit their player name, and land on the dashboard with a newly created profile.

steps.description: Fill a new unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password of at least 8 characters into the password field
Fill Player One into the player name field
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify a personalized greeting reflects the new player name

title: Skipping a permanent daily task recalculates streak and multiplier
description: Verifies skipping a permanent daily task updates the UI to reflect recalculated streak and multiplier state.

steps.description: Skip a permanent daily task for today
Verify the streak value displayed is updated
Verify the multiplier displayed is updated

title: Completing multiple category tasks updates meters and daily AP toward caps
description: Verifies completing tasks across multiple categories fills category meters and increases daily AP toward caps in the UI.

steps.description: Verify category progress meters update for the completed categories
Verify the daily AP shown on the dashboard increases toward daily caps

title: Earn-to-redeem: redeem a reward within balance and see history record
description: Verifies a user can redeem a reward they can afford, the AP balance decreases, and the redemption is recorded with a success confirmation.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the shop
Choose a reward with cost within the current balance
Verify the AP balance displayed in the shop decreases
Verify the redemption appears in the shop redemption history with a success confirmation visible

title: Dashboard shows today’s key progress widgets
description: Verifies the dashboard loads and displays today’s greeting, AP counter, XP bar, heatmap, and activity chart.

steps.description: Verify today's greeting and AP counter are displayed
Verify the XP bar, heatmap, and activity chart are displayed

title: Open a date to view day summary and AP logs
description: Verifies that selecting a date on the calendar opens a day view showing that day’s activity summary and AP log entries.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the calendar
Select a specific date in the calendar heatmap
Verify a day activity summary is displayed for the selected date
Verify Aura Points log entries are displayed for the selected date

title: Calendar heatmap and history overview render
description: Verifies that a logged-in user can open the calendar page and see a heatmap of past performance along with an AP history overview.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the calendar
Verify a calendar heatmap of past performance is displayed
Verify an Aura Points history overview is displayed

title: Update display name and see it reflected across the app
description: Verifies that changing the display name in settings persists and is reflected in other areas of the app such as the dashboard greeting and leaderboard user label.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open settings
Fill a new display name into the display name field
Click the navigation link to open the dashboard
Verify the dashboard reflects the updated display name
Click the navigation link to open the leaderboard
Verify the current user label reflects the updated display name

title: Add a new task and see it on the dashboard daily tracker
description: Verifies that creating a new task in the task manager persists and the new task appears in the dashboard daily tracker.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open settings
Fill a unique task name into the task name field
Click the navigation link to open the dashboard
Verify the new task appears in the daily tracker task list

title: View leaderboard with user rank highlighted
description: Verifies that a logged-in user can open the leaderboard and see a ranked list with their own row visually distinguished and showing their rank tag.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the leaderboard
Verify a ranked leaderboard list of users is displayed
Verify the current user’s row is highlighted and shows their rank indicator

title: Edit an existing task and see the updated task on the dashboard
description: Verifies that editing a task in settings updates the task shown in the dashboard daily tracker.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open settings
Fill a unique task name into the task name field
Open the newly created task for editing
Update the task name to a different unique value
Click the navigation link to open the dashboard
Verify the updated task appears in the daily tracker with the new name

title: Insufficient points prevents redemption and keeps AP unchanged
description: Verifies attempting to redeem a reward that costs more than the current balance shows an insufficient points alert and does not change AP.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the shop
Select a reward that costs more than the current balance
Verify an insufficient points alert is visible
Verify the AP balance displayed in the shop does not change

title: Identify streaks and gaps from recent weeks
description: Verifies that a user can scan recent weeks in the calendar heatmap to identify streak patterns and visible gaps in activity.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the calendar
Scroll through the calendar to view recent weeks
Verify the heatmap shows visual cues that distinguish active days from inactive days
Verify the heatmap makes gaps in activity visually apparent

title: Leaderboard ordered by Aura Points with top positions visible
description: Verifies that the leaderboard presents users ordered by total Aura Points with the highest-ranked positions visible at the top of the list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the leaderboard
Scroll to the top of the leaderboard list
Verify the top of the leaderboard shows the highest-ranked users with their Aura Points values visible
Verify rank ordering is presented from highest position at the top to lower positions below

title: Archive a task and confirm it no longer appears on the dashboard
description: Verifies that archiving a task in settings removes it from the dashboard daily tracker task list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open settings
Fill a unique task name into the task name field
Click the navigation link to open the dashboard
Verify the archived task is not shown in the daily tracker task list

title: Leaderboard supports scanning and locating current user
description: Verifies that a user can scroll through the leaderboard and still locate their own row with an identifying highlight and rank indicator.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the leaderboard
Scroll down the leaderboard list to later ranks
Scroll back toward the section where the current user’s row is located
Verify the current user’s row can be located and is visually distinguished with a rank indicator

title: Leaderboard position labels change based on rank
description: Verifies that the leaderboard shows distinct position labels/titles that vary based on rank (e.g., top ranks vs non-top ranks).

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the leaderboard
Scroll through the leaderboard list to view multiple rank positions
Verify that position labels/titles are displayed and differ between top ranks and lower ranks

title: Invalid credentials show inline error and keep user on auth
description: Verifies users cannot sign in with invalid credentials and see an inline error while remaining on the auth page.

steps.description: Fill invalid.user@example.com into the email field
Fill wrongpassword into the password field
Verify an inline authentication error is visible
Verify the user remains on the auth page

title: Signup enforces minimum password length
description: Verifies the signup form blocks submission for passwords shorter than 8 characters and shows an inline validation error.

steps.description: Fill a new unique email into the email field
Fill a password shorter than 8 characters into the password field
Verify a password validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the auth page
